name: Raisin Cranberry Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 large Tart Cooking Apple - coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Gradually heat to boiling, stirring frequently.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes, then allow to cool to room temperature.
4. Cover and refrigerate until chilled.
5. Serve.
